agentMode.clientId.title: Discord Client ID
agentMode.clientId.description: Override the bundled Discord Application Client ID. Leave empty to use the default.

enumDescriptions: Render the IDLE copy pool on idle.
Clear the Discord activity on idle (RPC stays connected).
agentMode.idleBehavior.title: Idle Behavior
agentMode.idleBehavior.description: What to do when no editor is focused and no agent is active.

enumDescriptions: Render activity as 'Watching X' (default — pattern interrupt, signals you're supervising the AI).
Render activity as 'Playing X' (fallback for clients that do not render the Watching prefix correctly).
agentMode.activityType.title: Activity Type
agentMode.activityType.description: Controls the Discord ActivityType prefix. Default 'watching' is the brand stance: you are watching the AI agent build. Switch to 'playing' if your Discord client does not render Watching correctly.

agentMode.debug.verbose.title: Verbose Debug Logging
agentMode.debug.verbose.description: Enables detailed logging in the 'Agent Mode (Discord)' output channel.

agentMode.animations.enabled.title: Enable frame animations
agentMode.animations.enabled.description: When false, multi-frame messages render their first frame statically.

agentMode.messages.customPackPath.title: Custom Pack Path
agentMode.messages.customPackPath.description: Absolute path to a JSON copy pack. Falls back to built-in goblin pack if invalid.

enumDescriptions: Replace the active filename with an empty string.
agentMode.privacy.filename.title: Filename Privacy
agentMode.privacy.filename.description: Whether to expose the active filename in Discord presence.

enumDescriptions: Show the current Git branch verbatim.
Replace the Git branch with an empty string.
agentMode.privacy.gitBranch.title: Git Branch Privacy
agentMode.privacy.gitBranch.description: Whether to expose the current Git branch in Discord presence.

enumDescriptions: Replace workspace name with empty string.
Replace with 6-char SHA-1 prefix of the absolute path.
agentMode.privacy.workspaceName.title: Workspace Name Privacy
agentMode.privacy.workspaceName.description: Whether to expose the workspace name in Discord presence.

agentMode.ignore.gitHosts.title: Ignored Git Hosts
agentMode.ignore.gitHosts.description: Host names matched case-insensitively against the current repository's Git host; matches silence the extension entirely.

agentMode.ignore.organizations.title: Ignored Organizations (regex)
agentMode.ignore.organizations.description: Regex patterns matched against the normalized host/owner segment of the current repository.

agentMode.ignore.repositories.title: Ignored Repositories (regex)
agentMode.ignore.repositories.description: Regex patterns matched against normalized host/owner/repo.

agentMode.ignore.workspaces.title: Ignored Workspaces (glob)
agentMode.ignore.workspaces.description: Glob patterns matched against absolute workspace paths; matches silence the extension entirely.

agentMode.detect.customPatterns.title: Custom agent regex patterns
agentMode.detect.customPatterns.description: User-defined regex → agent label mappings, added to the built-in detection set.

agentMode.detect.sessionFileStalenessSec.title: Session-file staleness threshold (seconds)
agentMode.detect.sessionFileStalenessSec.description: Seconds after which a Claude Code JSONL session file is considered stale and no longer signals an active agent.
